Meta.homeTitle: 海那边 | Chinese Lessons in Dubai
Meta.homeDescription: Clear, patient and personalized Chinese lessons for families in Dubai and abroad.

Common.eyebrow: 海那边 · Chinese Lessons in Dubai

Home.heroTitle: Chinese can thrive, wherever home is.
Home.heroDescription: Clear, patient and personalized Chinese lessons for children, teenagers and families in Dubai.
Home.heroNote: Online and in-person options in Dubai · Details to be confirmed
Home.audienceTitle: Start from where your child is now
Home.audienceIntro: Whether Chinese is completely new or part of family life, every learner deserves the right starting point.
Home.lessonsIntro: We first understand the learner’s level and goals, then choose or combine suitable lesson content.
Home.approachTitle: Structured learning with a human pace
Home.approachIntro: Lessons focus on lasting understanding and expression, not the appearance of quick progress.
Home.approachOneText: Content and pace adjust to age, level, interests and family goals.
Home.approachTwoText: Vocabulary and knowledge return to real conversation, reading and writing.
Home.approachThreeText: Regular reviews help parents understand progress and the next priority.
Home.processTitle: From first conversation to regular lessons
Home.teacherText: This area will introduce the teacher’s name, experience, languages and educational approach. The prototype does not add unverified credentials or results.
Home.pricingTitle: Understand the structure, then confirm the right arrangement
Home.faqTitle: What parents often ask before booking
Home.ctaTitle: Start with a conversation about your child
Home.ctaText: Share their age, current Chinese experience and goals so the right lesson direction can be discussed.

About.title: Meet the Teacher
About.subtitle: 认识老师
About.intro: A Chinese classroom that feels clear and reassuring begins with knowing who will teach your child.
About.nameValue: Chinese and English name to be supplied
About.bio: The teacher’s biography, teaching background and connection to Dubai will be added after confirmation. No unverified qualifications or achievements are presented here.
About.philosophy: The teacher’s own philosophy will appear here. It should explain the balance of listening, speaking, reading and writing, age-appropriate choices, and parent communication.
About.nameNote: 海那边 gently suggests distance and connection in life abroad. First and foremost, it is a simple, memorable name for a Chinese classroom.

Lessons.title: Find the right direction for Chinese learning
Lessons.intro: These are starting points for discussion. Content, materials and pace are confirmed after understanding the learner.
Lessons.visualTwo: Child or teenager learning photo placeholder
Lessons.customText: Tell us the learner’s age, Chinese experience and goals. We will discuss an appropriate starting point.

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent lesson options
Pricing.intro: This structure supports future lesson choices. All prices, currency, durations and package policies await final confirmation.
Pricing.notice: No payment is taken on this site. Final prices, currency, payment method, validity and change policies will be confirmed before launch.

Book.title: Book a trial lesson
Book.intro: A scheduling service will appear below in the future. For now, review the process or use the contact page to share learning needs.
Book.step1Text: Choose the lesson direction you would like to explore.
Book.step2Text: View available appointments shown in Dubai time.
Book.step3Text: Share the learner’s age, level and goals.
Book.step4Text: Pay through a future hosted checkout page.
Book.step5Text: Receive lesson details by email or an agreed channel.
Book.timezoneText: Appointments will be clearly shown in Gulf Standard Time (GST, UTC+4).
Book.policyText: The final policy will be confirmed and shown clearly before payment.
Book.securityText: A hosted payment service will be used; this website will not store card details directly.
Book.fallbackText: Until scheduling is connected, use the contact form to share preferred lessons and times.

FAQ.title: What to know before booking
FAQ.intro: These answers describe the prototype. Details involving locations, prices and policies will be updated after confirmation.

items.q: What ages are the lessons for?
items.a: Lessons are planned primarily for children and teenagers, with other specific needs open for discussion. The final age range is to be confirmed.
Yes. A consultation or trial can identify a suitable starting point such as pinyin, pronunciation and basic expression.

items.q: Are lessons online or in person?
items.a: The site allows for online and in-person options in Dubai. Actual availability is to be confirmed.

items.q: Where do in-person lessons take place?
items.a: The specific Dubai teaching location has not been published and will be confirmed before booking.

items.q: Do you teach simplified or traditional Chinese?
items.a: The website and planned lessons use simplified Chinese. Other needs can be discussed before booking.
Yes, pinyin and pronunciation are available as a lesson direction and can be adapted to age and need.

items.q: Are materials included in the lesson fee?
items.a: Materials, how they are supplied and any related fees are still to be confirmed.
Observation arrangements will depend on learner age, lesson format and the teacher’s recommendation.

items.q: Can we keep the same weekly time?
items.a: The future booking flow will show availability. A regular time needs to be agreed by both sides.

items.q: How do cancellations or changes work?
items.a: The policy is being prepared and will be shown clearly before any payment.
The provider and currency are not yet selected. This prototype processes no payments.
Appointments are planned to use Gulf Standard Time (GST, UTC+4), clearly labelled at booking.

Contact.title: Tell us about the learner
Contact.intro: Use this form to preview the future contact flow. This prototype does not send or save any information.
Contact.name: Parent or student name
Contact.message: What would you like the teacher to know?
Contact.consent: I understand this is a prototype and my information will not be sent or saved.
Contact.consentRequired: Please confirm that you understand this is a prototype.
Contact.successText: The form passed validation, but no information was sent or saved. Real contact will be enabled after a service is connected.
Contact.detailsText: The teacher’s confirmed email, phone and WeChat details will appear here.

Footer.tagline: Clear, patient and personalized Chinese learning support for families abroad.
Footer.note: This is a frontend prototype. Booking, payments and form delivery are not enabled.

Integration.bookingText: A calendar and scheduling provider will appear here. No time slots are shown and no bookings can be created yet.
Integration.paymentText: A hosted payment entry point will appear here. No payment details are collected or transactions processed.
Integration.contactText: Validation is simulated in the browser; no data leaves this page.
